mapper.sql: payment_id AS paymentId, reservation_id AS reservationId, amount, payment_key AS paymentKey, payment_status AS paymentStatus, order_id AS orderId, paid_at AS paidAt, payment_type AS paymentType
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PAYMENT (reservation_id, amount, payment_key, payment_status, order_id, paid_at, payment_type) VALUES (#{reservationId}, #{amount}, #{paymentKey}, #{paymentStatus}, #{orderId}, #{paidAt}, #{paymentType})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM PAYMENT WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId} ORDER BY payment_id DESC
